claim: Scientific studies support the conclusion that marijuana can play a role in healing broken bones.

result.claim: Scientific studies support the conclusion that marijuana can play a role in healing broken bones.
result.reasoning: The searches for "marijuana can play a role in healing broken bones", "cannabinoids bone healing", and "CBD bone repair" did not yield any direct evidence or scientific studies supporting the claim. The retrieved propositions and chunks were either about the general properties of cannabis compounds (Paper ID: 17), unrelated medical conditions (Paper ID: 56), or general biological processes not linked to bone healing (Paper ID: 7, 45). There was no information found in the knowledge base that directly addresses the role of marijuana or its components in the healing of broken bones.
